name: Nomdara Bond Registry Ring
summary: Registry mechanism preserving caravan obligations, bonded passage, and reciprocal trust across traveling routes.
day_to_day: Records caravan bonds, verifies obligations, and maintains trusted route relationships.
who_works_there: Registry keepers, caravan elders, bond witnesses.
who_uses_it: Nomdara caravans, trading partners, remote settlements needing trusted passage.
authority: Can validate or damage bonded trust status across caravan networks.
public_manifestation: Sealed bond tokens, witness circles, route-side registry checks.
conflict_or_bottleneck: A broken bond can collapse trust across multiple dangerous routes at once.
